name: Crock Pot Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken Thighs Without Skin (or pieces), cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the chicken in the flour mixed with salt. Shake off excess and brown in a hot skillet.
2. Remove the chicken and add it to the crockpot.
3. Mix together the frozen lemonade concentrate, brown sugar, balsamic vinegar (or regular vinegar), and catsup. Pour this mixture over the chicken.
4. Cook on high for 3-4 hours.
5. When ready to serve, remove the chicken to a warm platter. Thicken the sauce with the cornstarch and water solution.
6. Serve along with the chicken.
